name: 💥 Lane: Terminal Escalation
description: ESCALATE DEMONSTRATION — This lane checks for both sitemap.xml and robots.txt (neither exists). retryBudget=1, so after one retry the budget is exhausted and the supervisor forces ESCALATE. DAG status becomes 'partial'. Other lanes are unaffected and continue running.

checks.fail: ❌ [escalate] No robots.txt — cannot proceed without URL structure

checks.prompt: Attempt to auto-recover: generate a minimal sitemap.xml and robots.txt content for this project. If insufficient context exists, explicitly state the escalation reason. Context: {retryContext}
